code:
import io
import string
import list

fn read_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping and i < n
      let b = read_byte(s, i)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut neg = false
      let first = read_byte(s, i)
      if first == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading and i < n
        let c = read_byte(s, i)
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
      if neg
        val = 0 - val
      end
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, x)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in xs
      if not inserted and x < y
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
let nums2 = parse_line(line2)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums1
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end
for x in nums2
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
